svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="修复代价递增" id="cg3"> <mxGraphModel dx="-454" dy="-139" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="900" pageHeight="380" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="s1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dbeafe;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="pre-commit
改几行注解
5 秒" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="40" y="240" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#2563eb;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="CI（合并前）
重新提 PR
半小时" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="240" y="190" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s3" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b45309;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="测试环境
联调排查
半天" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="160" x="440" y="130" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="s4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#b91c1c;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;" value="线上
事故复盘 + 回滚
用户已感知" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="70" width="180" x="640" y="50" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="s1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="s2"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="s2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#64748b;endArrow=block;" target="s3"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="s3" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=0;strokeColor=#b91c1c;endArrow=block;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;" target="s4" value="代价递增"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="note" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;fontStyle=2;" value="跨层 bug 越往后修越贵。pre-commit 闸把发现时机卡在最左端,代价最低。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="780" x="40" y="330" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
